The Chicago Standard

Most Shops Learn on Your Vehicle. This Team Has 5,000+ Commercial Wraps Behind Them.

Since 2014, Chicago Fleet Wraps has handled commercial fleet programs for Amazon DSP operators, regional distributors, trade contractors, and national brands. Every install uses Avery Dennison MPI 1005 or 3M Series 1080 cast vinyl — not calendered, not economy.

  • Avery Dennison Preferred Installer
  • 3M Certified Wrap Installer
  • HP Latex print facility — Pantone-matched
  • Free fleet pickup throughout Chicagoland
  • Zero verified paint damage claims in 10+ years
  • 2-year workmanship warranty
